name: Stanford, Blake (Mr.)
evidence: Blake Stanford is founder/president of Southwest Human Development Services, a 3309 Hancock Dr, Austin 78731 nonprofit sponsoring the USDA child-care food program (CACFP); zip 78731 matches his org address exactly. Also a registered TX lobbyist for the program. Gave to Brigid Shea.

name: McNamara, Daniel
resolved_employer: Solo practitioner, environmental law (Daniel G. McNamara)
evidence: Best match is Daniel G. McNamara, a solo environmental-law attorney at 3502 Bridle Path, Austin 78703 (~40 yrs experience) — zip matches and environmental practice fits his gifts to environmentalist Brigid Shea. A second Daniel McNamara (UT Applied Research Labs) also lives in 78703, so some residual ambiguity.

name: Robb, Walter
resolved_employer: Stonewall Robb Advisors / S2G Ventures; former co-CEO of Whole Foods Market
evidence: Walter Robb, former co-CEO of Austin-based Whole Foods Market (2010-2016), now a food/ag investor (partner at S2G Ventures, founder of Stonewall Robb Advisors) living in the CA Bay Area. Filed occupation 'Consultant/Self' and San Rafael 94903 zip fit his Bay Area residence; gave to Travis County Judge Andy Brown, consistent with deep Austin ties. Strong-Democrat FEC pattern (lean 1.0, 60 gifts).

name: Liberal Austin Democrats
resolved_employer: Democratic political club / PAC (not an individual)
evidence: Liberal Austin Democrats is a long-running Travis County Democratic political club (PO Box 49712, Austin 78765) that endorses and funds Democratic candidates; it is itself the donor, giving to Jeff Travillion and Brigid Shea.

name: Mercer, James
evidence: James W. Mercer, ~71-73, homeowner at 15710 Voelker Ln, Elgin 78621 (zip matches); a 'Mercer & Assoc' B2B entity is listed at the same home address but occupation/industry cannot be confirmed. Republican-leaning FEC pattern (lean 0.05). Not enough to classify an industry.

name: Hersch, Robert
resolved_employer: Mastodon Ventures, Inc. (Founder / Senior Managing Partner)
evidence: Robert Hersch is founder/senior managing partner of Mastodon Ventures, an Austin M&A and capital-advisory (investment banking) firm focused on the consumer/restaurant sector; matches his filed occupation 'Investment Banker / Mastodon Ventures' and Austin 78703 residence. Gave to Andy Brown.

name: Cullen, Luanne
evidence: Luanne Cullen co-owns a ~$1M+ home at 9801 Glenlake Dr, Austin 78730 (zip matches) with Charles H. Cullen; consistently files 'Not Employed' and is a prolific small-dollar Democratic donor (FEC lean 1.0, 162 gifts, incl. Biden Victory Fund). Gave to Andy Brown.

name: Bosworth, Justin
evidence: Best match is Justin Marcellus Bosworth, a Dallas corporate/capital-markets associate at Kirkland & Ellis (UT School of Law); public records tie a Justin Bosworth to 3914 Dunhaven Rd, Dallas 75220 (zip matches). One-time Dec-2025 gift to Brigid Shea.

name: Tiemann, Matthew
resolved_employer: Tiemann Land and Cattle Development, Inc. (President) — real-estate developer/investor
evidence: Matthew Tiemann is a prolific Austin-area real-estate investor/developer, President of Tiemann Land & Cattle Development (Pflugerville), with dozens of land/holding entities across Pflugerville, Hutto, Rockdale and Austin. No zip in the record, but his single 2021 gift went to Jeff Travillion, whose Precinct 1 covers his Pflugerville/eastern-Travis holdings.

name: Carter, Darryl
resolved_employer: Law Office of Darryl B. Carter — attorney & lobbyist
evidence: Best match is Darryl B. Carter, a Houston business-litigation attorney and lobbyist (formerly with tax-collection firm Linebarger Goggan Blair & Sampson), who lobbied in Austin for Harris County clients; Houston 77019 (River Oaks) fits. Gave to Jeff Travillion in 2017. A Houston obituary suggests he has since passed.
